query:
ALTER TABLE users 
ADD COLUMN investor_type ENUM('individual', 'collective', 'founder') NULL,
ADD COLUMN isFounder TINYINT(1) DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL,
ADD COLUMN founderTitle VARCHAR(100) NULL,
ADD COLUMN founderOrder INT NULL,
ADD COLUMN investorPhotoUrl TEXT NULL,
ADD COLUMN investorQuote VARCHAR(500) NULL,
ADD COLUMN investorBio TEXT NULL,
ADD COLUMN investorBadge VARCHAR(50) NULL,
ADD COLUMN investorJoinedAt TIMESTAMP NULL,
ADD COLUMN investorTotalInvested BIGINT DEFAULT 0,
ADD COLUMN investorShowInWall TINYINT(1) DEFAULT 1 NOT NULL;
